rationale: A3 busca instrumentos e frameworks para competencias alimentares, adesao, literacia alimentar e comportamento alimentar. O scoring do Global Watch ja reconhece eating competence, mas a taxonomia/querypack principal ainda nao possui um bloco auditavel para Satter Eating Competence e variantes. Estes termos sao especificos o suficiente para ampliar cobertura de instrumentos sem abrir uma busca ampla por comportamento alimentar generico.
noise_controls: Keep these terms under artigo3_framework/A3 rather than all workstreams by default.
Anchor provider queries to instrument, psychometric, validation, framework, adherence, food literacy, diet quality, or behavior-change terms.
Do not use broad standalone eating behavior terms without nutrition or instrument anchors.
expected_pipeline_integration_points: src/nutev/querypacks/semantic_blocks.py: add instrument/document terms for validation-focused retrieval
config/keyword_taxonomy.json: optionally add A3 web_query_hints for questionnaire/instrument recovery
